notes: Strengthens contrast for muted text, captions, card borders and Pathmark-owned UI in Streamlit dark mode.
Makes seasonal accent changes immediately visible when selecting Summer, Autumn, Winter or Spring before saving.
Uses stronger seasonal accent colours so changes are visible in both Streamlit Light and Dark appearances.
Keeps Streamlit in control of Light, Dark and System appearance while Pathmark only controls seasonal accents.
release: v0.6.46 Seasonal accent visibility and contrast repair
release_name: Seasonal accent visibility and contrast repair
release_notes: Improves contrast under Streamlit light/dark mode and makes seasonal accent changes visibly apply as a live preview.
label: Seasonal accent visibility and contrast repair
